'''Archais''' was an ancient kingdom on [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]]. The [[King/Legends|King]] of Archais defeated numerous rival kingdoms at the [[Battle of the Ten Valleys]], unifying the planet. Alsakan's planetary epic the ''[[Archaiad]]'' may have referred to this event.

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|9|Race for the Tessent}}
